<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check initial state
if history:
    first_frame = history[0].frame
    print("Initial state (step", first_frame.step, "):")
    seg = first_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N', 'M'] and n['pixels'] >= 16:
            b = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Also check the last transition to see what changed
if last_transition:
    print("\nLast transition:")
    print("  Action:", last_transition.action)
    print("  Before step:", last_transition.before_frame.step)
    print("  After step:", last_transition.after_frame.step)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
